title: centaurea urumovii
intro: Centaurea urumovii, also known as Balkan cornflower, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to parts of Eastern Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Centaurea urumovii include relief from respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Centaurea urumovii, such as teas and infusions, have been used to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
